calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Four Minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellem Chaitan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Petitioners Thida Mya and Mayngthan Wai were present in pro per as Guardians ad Litem for the minors Wut Mone OO, Saw Yu Yadana, Ma Aye Chan Pyai & Aung Sitt Pai, who were also present at today's hearing.
Petitioners and the minors were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed name changes were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the four Minors to Erica Wut Mone Chan, Evelyn Saw Yu Chan, Ester Aye Chan & Eric Aung Sitt Chan.

Decrees Changing Name were submitted to and signed by the Court.
